_comment: Cursor IDE MCP configuration for the Unfold AI Academy
_instructions: 1. Open Cursor → Settings → MCP (or Cursor Settings → Features → MCP Servers)
3. Replace YOUR_UNFOLD_API_KEY with your key from app.unfoldit.com → Organization → API Keys
5. You can now use Unfold tools directly in Cursor's AI chat.
_example_prompts: I just finished implementing the RAG pipeline. Create a learning goal for me to master LLM observability next.
Our team is starting a new AI project. Set up learning paths for everyone based on their role.
Check if there are any learners who haven't touched their AI goals this week.
I want to assess my prompt engineering skills before starting the advanced module.
Generate a learning plan to help me go from beginner to intermediate in AI safety.
